name: Keen IO
tagline: Inspect event collections and analytics schemas
description: List event collections and their inferred property schemas for a Keen project using a read-capable API key. Write and administrative operations require different key capabilities and should be added as separate reviewed tools.

auth.hint: Send an appropriate Keen project key in the Authorization header. Use a Read Key for this read-only candidate and never expose the Master Key to clients.

tools.name: list_event_collections
tools.description: Return event collections for a Keen project with their property schemas and sub-resource links.

params.name: project_id
params.description: Keen project identifier that owns the event collections.

params.name: include_schema
params.description: Include collection property schemas; defaults to true.
